title: Duplicate automations to existing boards

posts.author: Michiel_de_Wit (Michiel)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to create a new automation and duplicate it to other (already existing) boards.

I found that it is possible to create board templates with automations already in it,
but now I want to create a new automation and use it in all my existing boards.
It will be a lot of work to make the same automation for al my boards.

It would be nice to just add the automation from a list with my excisting automations?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Michiel,

You are able to save automation recipes as a template - I think this might be what you’re looking for!

More details here → https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360012254440-Build-your-own-custom-automation

Let me know if I’ve misunderstood

posts.author: Michiel_de_Wit (Michiel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Bianca,

You understood me, but. infortunatly this is not possible with the authomation I created.
I want to place an item in my outlook agenda, when it is assigned to me.
This I can do, but the function to save it as a template is disabled.
But thank you for this information.

posts.author: ByronGriffin (ByronGriffin)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, it would be handy to be able to quickly add existing automations from a list to other boards. This would save a lot of time and simplify the process of creating new automations across multiple boards. Developers may consider this feature for future platform updates.
